layers.name: Interactive Visual Components

layers.name: Project Automation Infrastructure

layers.name: Project Environment Settings
layers.description: A collection of project-level configuration files, build settings, and environment-specific utility hooks for the application.

layers.name: Core Logic Utilities
layers.description: Shared helper functions and state management logic that provide foundational support for animations, performance tracking, and data handling.
